name: Garlic-Braised Rapini
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove and discard the fibrous base stems of the rapini. Rinse the rapini in a colander and pat dry.
2. In a large, wide skillet, heat the oil over medium heat.
3. Add the garlic and bread; sauté for 2 to 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Stir in the rapini and cook for 3 to 4 minutes more, stirring frequently until the greens are wilted.
5. Transfer to serving plates and season to taste.
